case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ANDREW D SO

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100198930) FILED BY ATTORNEY HUNT, MICHAEL SCOTT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100110373) AS TO DEFENDANT SO, ANDREW D
